Client tracker preview for Go Dog Go Pet Care

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Go Dog Go Pet Care: A reservation-first tracker for Ayn's in-home Tacoma boarding — daytime acclimation sessions, vaccine status, compatibility flags, and special-care notes in one place instead of scattered across call-or-text threads.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

We are currently experiencing high demand for boarding & daycare. Please book these services well in advance., New to us? Please contact us to schedule some daytime boarding sessions so we can get to know your dog, Call or text to schedule, $35 special needs dogs (medication delivery, special diets, separation anxiety, not housebroken, etc.)

Today at Go Dog Go Reservation board Biscuit Y. Record Reservation + Vaccine View Stay Timing + Holiday Window Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every new dog moves from inquiry through daytime acclimation sessions to first overnight stay in one record
  • Compatibility flags (neutered, cat-friendly, breed/size) live on the dog's page so booking rules aren't rebuilt each holiday
  • $30 base vs $35 special-care tier tracked with the medication / diet / anxiety notes that trigger it

1. Today at Go Dog Go

Today at Go Dog Go

Dogs on property, today's drop-offs and pickups, the day's daytime acclimation session, and any vaccine expirations to flag — one snapshot behind the 'call or text to schedule' queue.

Open this view

2. Reservation board

Reservation board

Every dog moves left-to-right: Inquiry → Daytime acclimation → Vaccine records → Confirmed stay → On property → Pickup recap. Call/text requests land in one column instead of across voicemails.

Open this view

3. Biscuit Y. Record

Biscuit Y. Record

Per-dog page: breed, owner, feeding, medications, vaccines, compatibility flags (neutered / cat-friendly / size), special-care notes, emergency contact — the file you used to rebuild from a text thread each time.

Open this view

4. Reservation + Vaccine View

Reservation + Vaccine View

Confirm a stay in one screen: dates, daytime-acclimation status, Rabies/DHPP/Bordetella currency, $30 vs $35 special-care tier, and deposit.

Open this view

5. Stay Timing + Holiday Window

Stay Timing + Holiday Window

This week's drop-offs and pickups, daytime acclimation sessions, the Memorial Day / July 4 holiday waitlist with vaccine readiness, and blackout dates — all on one timeline.

Open this view

6. Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

After every stay: short recap with photos, flagged health/behavior notes, and a prompt to offer the next holiday window — so repeat owners don't re-run intake.

Open this view

7. Setup Map

Setup Map

Six-step setup: duplicate the template, paste the rate card ($30 / $35 / $25), import regulars with compatibility flags, set vaccine reminders, turn on the public inquiry link, and pin the high-demand banner during holiday windows.

Open this view
